design_plan: rng=42; AIDA: Attention(hero recruiting pain), Interest(agent runs sourcing+coordination), Desire(computer-use cache savings), Action(CTA); hero max-width=1120px ensures 2–3 lines; bento density verified via grid-auto-flow:dense; competitors label sweep included; button contrast black/white pills checked.
headline: Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews

site_brief.audience: recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews AI assistant
recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page that shows how Super’s personal AI agents operate real recruiting tools, reuse a computer‑use cache, and cut repeated sourcing and interview‑coordination work. Built with the same visual architecture as Super’s comparison pages and grounded in current recruiting and agentic‑AI market evidence.
